name: Tasting Menu (6 courses)
desc: Chef's choice, six plates across the full kitchen. Wine pairing optional.

name: Wine Pairing
desc: Four-glass pairing by Bianca, from Piedmontese reds to Sardinian whites.

name: Private Dining Room
desc: Back room for up to 18 guests. Set menu from €75/person.

name: Chef's Table
desc: Four seats at the pass. Paolo cooks for you, explains each plate.

name: Pasta Class with Marco
desc: Two hours at the marble table. Roll sfoglia by hand, cut tagliatelle, eat what you make.

name: Lunch Menu (3 courses)
desc: Antipasto + primo or secondo + dolce. Weekdays only.
